calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Review As To Placement Status
Off Calendar Feb-28-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deborah Fox representing Saint Mary's Hospital.

Ms. Fox stated that there is a disagreement over Mr. Kay's capacity, she believes that the neuropsychiatry-evaluations will most likely show that Mr. Kay is unable to be released back into the community. Ms. Fox thanked the Court for providing an opportunity to speak to Mr. Blackman. Mr. Blackman stated that The San Francisco Public Guardian can file immediately for a Temporary Conservatorship as long as the neuropsychiatry evaluation supports it. Furthermore, Ms. Fox informed the court that Mr. Kay does not consent to long term placement and for now is content at St. Mary's. The Court suggests Ms. Fox contact Mr. Ron Patton of the Public Conservator's office to look into an LPS Conservatorship and Ms. Jones provided some suggestions to Ms. Fox regarding dual Conservatorship. The status is taken of calendar.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Court Investigator: Cynthia Jones. Clerk: Ella Yip/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Sr. Deputy M. Benton.
